transcript: AI: Mera haath pakdo, Hold my hand. [Hold my hand, Hold my hand.] Human: Hold my hand. AI: Dhairya rakho, Have patience. [Have patience, Have patience.] Human: Have patience. AI: Upar jao, Go upstairs. [Go upstairs, Go upstairs.] Human: Go upstairs. AI: Sone jao, Go to bed. [Go to bed, Go to bed.] Human: Go to bed. AI: Mujhe tumpe gussa aa raha hai, I'm angry with you. [I'm angry with you, I'm angry with you.] Human: I'm angry with you. AI: Mujhe nahi pata, I don't know. [I don't know, I don't know.] Human: I don't know. AI Voiceover: MySivi app par mere saath Hindi mein baat karke Angrezi seekhein, woh bhi sirf ₹1 mein. Mere saath kabhi bhi, jitni der chahein, utni der practice karein. Bolna, vyakaran, wakya banana aur sahi shabdon ka istemal, sab kuch ek hi jagah par. [Learn English by talking to me in Hindi on the MySivi app, that too for just ₹1. Practice with me anytime, for as long as you want. Speaking, grammar, sentence formation, and using the right words, all in one place.] Male Voiceover: Install Now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Mera haath pakdo / Hold my hand / Dhairya rakho / Have patience / Go upstairs / Go to bed / Mujhe tumpe gussa aa raha hai / I'm angry with you / I don't know / MySivi / 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 / 24/7 AI English Teacher / 500+ Exercises and Lessons / Unlimited Access / Install Now
summary: An AI avatar teaches English translations of Hindi phrases to a human user in a split-screen format. The ad promotes the MySivi app's 24/7 AI English tutoring, offering a 3-day premium trial for ₹1. The call to action urges viewers to install the app.
